title: The Image Display Area During Vision Sequence Execution
description:
The Image Display Area During Vision Sequence Execution

The Image Display During Vision Sequence Execution

When a vision sequence is executed, the image display will show which vision objects were found and which were not found by a display of color.  The vision objects which were found will display a green outline of the search window and found position.  The vision objects which were not found will display a red outline of the search window. (Since they are not found there will be no found position displayed.)

Note: Keep in mind that if the Graphics property for a specific vision object is set to None, then no graphics will be displayed for that specific vision object.  To ensure that all vision objects have their graphics displayed, click the  [Force All Graphics On] button on the Vision Guide toolbar.  This will cause all graphics to be displayed regardless of the individual Graphics property settings.
